---
title: Determining the clustering metrics
date: 2024-07-02
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Set up the packages that can calculate clustering metrics

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA UBC file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240527/ubc_subset.qs`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240702`

# Process and Results

Using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(clValid)
library(cluster)
```

Loading in the Seurat object
```{r eval=FALSE}
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240702"
ubc_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240527/ubc_subset.qs")
```

UBCs were clustered at 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.4, 0.6, and 0.8 resolutions. Lets take that data and determine the metrics.

Setting the seed
```{r eval=FALSE}
set.seed(1)
```

## Silhouette Score

```{r eval=FALSE}
# Extract embeddings and labels
embeddings <- Embeddings(ubc_cca, "pca")

# Compute the distance matrix
dist_matrix <- dist(embeddings[,1:25], method="euclidean")

# Define the list to store silhouette scores
silhouette_scores_list <- list()

# Define the resolutions
resolutions <- c("0.1", "0.2", "0.3", "0.4", "0.6", "0.8")

for(res in resolutions){
  Idents(ubc_cca) <- paste0("snn_res.", res)
  cluster_labels <- Idents(ubc_cca)
  # Compute the silhouette scores
  silhouette_scores <- silhouette(as.numeric(cluster_labels), dist_matrix)
  
  # Plot silhouette scores
  cluster_labels <- silhouette_scores[, "cluster"]
  silhouette_widths <- silhouette_scores[, "sil_width"]

  df <- data.frame(Cluster = as.factor(cluster_labels),
                  Silhouette_Width = silhouette_widths)
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Silhouette_Width, y = Cluster, fill = Cluster)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", orientation = "horizontal") +
      labs(title = "Silhouette Widths",
          x = "Silhouette Width",
          y = "Cluster") +
      theme_classic()
  
  p + theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
  
  ggsave(filename = paste0("silhouette_plot_res_", "0.1", ".png"), plot = p, path = out_directory, 
        width =20, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 600)

  silhouette_scores_list[[res]] <- summary(silhouette_scores)$avg.width
}
```

## Dunn Index

```{r eval=FALSE}
# Define the list to store Dunn scores
dunn_scores_list <- list()

for(res in resolutions){
  Idents(ubc_cca) <- paste0("snn_res.", res)
  cluster_labels <- Idents(ubc_cca)
  # Compute the Dunn scores
  dunn_scores <- dunn(distance = dist_matrix, clusters = as.numeric(cluster_labels))
  dunn_scores_list[[res]] <- dunn_scores
}
```

## Connectivity

```{r eval=FALSE}
# Define the list to store Dunn scores
connectivity_scores_list <- list()

for(res in resolutions){
  Idents(ubc_cca) <- paste0("snn_res.", res)
  cluster_labels <- Idents(ubc_cca)
  # Compute the connectivity scores
  connectivity_scores <- connectivity(distance = dist_matrix, clusters = as.numeric(cluster_labels), neighbSize = 20)
  connectivity_scores_list[[res]] <- connectivity_scores
}
```


## Metrics 

Compile the metrics into a dataframe
```{r eval=FALSE}
df <- data.frame(
  silhouette_score = unlist(silhouette_scores_list),
  dunn_index = unlist(dunn_scores_list),
  connectivity_score = unlist(connectivity_scores_list)
)
row.names(df) <- names(silhouette_scores_list)
print(df)
```
```{r eval=FALSE}
    silhouette_score dunn_index connectivity_score
0.1        0.2702008 0.05570996           1142.076
0.2        0.1695746 0.06013220           2616.311
0.3        0.1585265 0.06382360           3431.616
0.4        0.1718418 0.06463045           3734.538
0.6        0.1719552 0.06421211           3622.413
0.8        0.1086382 0.06413680           5542.433
```

![The metrics compiled into one table](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240702/clustering_metrics.png)
